test_cases.title: Login with incorrect password shows generic error message
preconditions: A registered user account exists with a known email
steps: Enter a valid email with an incorrect password
test_cases.expected_result: A generic error message is displayed; the message does not indicate whether the email exists in the system

test_cases.title: Failed login attempt is recorded in the system log
steps: Submit the login form with a valid email and incorrect password
Navigate to the audit or security log as an administrator
test_cases.expected_result: The failed attempt is logged with the email, timestamp, and outcome

test_cases.title: Password field is cleared after a failed login
preconditions: User is on the login page
steps: Enter any email and an incorrect password
test_cases.expected_result: The password field is cleared after the failed submission; the email field may remain populated

notes: Security-sensitive requirement. All three explicit outcomes (generic error, logging, cleared field) are each covered by a dedicated test case.
